{{Infobox artifact
| name = Eclipse
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

''See also: [[Eclipse Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Eclipse, also known as the [[Ancient Bow of the Soulseeker]] or the Sacred [[Bow]] of the Soulseeker, is a powerful weapon wielded by [[Mercy]], the daughter of the [[Monarch]]. The bow's history traces back through various ranks from [[Lowgold]] to [[Archlord]], and it was used by [[Mercy's mother]] to seal the Shara Kahn volcano. The weapon is crafted from the remnant of a shadow [[dragon]] that attained the status of a [[Sage]]. Visually, the bow features a [[dragon]]'s head at its center with blazing eyes. In combat, it can rapidly generate hundreds of amethyst or violet light arrows to be used as a barrage.}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Eclipse is the [[Ancient Bow of the Soulseeker]], a weapon crafted from the remnant of a shadow [[dragon]] that attained Sagehood. Originally belonging to [[Mercy's mother]], the bow was carried through a journey spanning from [[Lowgold]] to [[Archlord]]. During her tenure, [[Mercy's mother]] utilized the weapon to seal the living volcano of Shara Kahn. This bow possesses the ability to forge arrows of jet-black color, and it is affectionately referred to as [[Suu]] by [[Mercy]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Eclipse]] is the [[Ancient Bow of the Soulseeker]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14">''Ghostwater'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Eclipse]] is a bow that can forge jet-black arrows.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Eclipse]] was the weapon of [[Mercy's mother]] from [[Lowgold]] to [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Eclipse]] was made from the [[Remnant]] of a shadow [[dragon]] who became a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mercy's mother]] used [[Eclipse]] to seal the living volcano of Shara Kahn.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mercy]] calls the bow [[Suu]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Mercy]] uses [[Eclipse]] for support.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7">''Uncrowned'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eclipse]] is a location with a [[dragon]]'s head at its center.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] wields [[Eclipse]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Mercy]] holds onto [[Eclipse]] for support.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
